metadata.description: The friendly name for the workbook that is used in the Gallery or Saved List.  This name must be unique within a resource group.
The gallery that the workbook will been shown under. Supported values include workbook, tsg, etc. Usually, this is 'workbook'
The id of resource instance to which the workbook will be associated
The unique guid for this workbook instance

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Microsoft Sentinel - Analytic + Data Lake Cost Analysis
---
This workbook provides a breakdown of log ingestion costs by **tier** - Analytics and Data Lake (Auxiliary). Use the parameters below to set your time window and per-GB pricing. Each table is categorized by its configured plan and the estimated cost is calculated accordingly.

> **Note:** Pricing defaults reflect East US Pay-As-You-Go simplified rates. Adjust to match your region, commitment tier, or EA/MCA agreement pricing."},"name":"header-text"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"241ba23b-a196-47c0-8c75-e2cc500fa375","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"DefaultSubscription","type":1,"isRequired":true,"query":"where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| take 1
| project subscriptionId","crossComponentResources":["value::selected"],"isHiddenWhenLocked":true,"queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resourcegraph/resources"},{"id":"d66682b7-33ea-47f1-8105-24dd75c20787","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"DefaultWorkspace","type":1,"query":"SecurityIncident
| take 1
| parse IncidentUrl with * "/workspaces/" Workspace "/" *
| project Workspace","isHiddenWhenLocked":true,"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},{"id":"7b5241e8-f0ba-462a-b02e-0483c42ac221","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"Subscription","type":6,"isRequired":true,"query":"summarize by subscriptionId
| project value = strcat("/subscriptions/", subscriptionId), label = subscriptionId, selected = iff(subscriptionId =~ '{DefaultSubscription}', true, false)","crossComponentResources":["value::selected"],"typeSettings":{"additionalResourceOptions":[],"showDefault":false},"queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resourcegraph/resources"},{"id":"4206df67-e5cc-485e-8ac9-d39b841dcd20","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"Workspace","type":5,"isRequired":true,"query":"resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces' 
| where subscriptionId == '{Subscription:id}'
| project id","crossComponentResources":["value::all"],"typeSettings":{"additionalResourceOptions":[],"showDefault":false},"queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resourcegraph/resources","value":"/subscriptions/9a22ee7f-f55e-4b7c-a8ff-594a3aa71d37/resourceGroups/rg-sentinel/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/sentinel-xdr"},{"id":"1b5e58e7-d017-435f-88d4-71dbe835552e","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"ResourceGroup","type":1,"isRequired":true,"query":"resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| where id == "{Workspace}"
| project resourceGroup","crossComponentResources":["value::selected"],"isHiddenWhenLocked":true,"queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resourcegraph/resources"},{"id":"a0b1c2d3-0001-0001-0001-000000000001","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","label":"Time Range","type":4,"isRequired":true,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":86400000,"createdTime":"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z","isInitialTime":false,"grain":1,"useDashboardTimeRange":false},{"durationMs":604800000,"createdTime":"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z","isInitialTime":false,"grain":1,"useDashboardTimeRange":false},{"durationMs":2592000000,"createdTime":"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z","isInitialTime":false,"grain":1,"useDashboardTimeRange":false},{"durationMs":7776000000,"createdTime":"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z","isInitialTime":false,"grain":1,"useDashboardTimeRange":false}],"allowCustom":true},"value":{"durationMs":2592000000}},{"id":"a0b1c2d3-0001-0001-0001-000000000004","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"DataLakeTables","label":"Data Lake Tier Tables (comma-separated)","type":1,"description":"Optional: Comma-separated list of table names configured on Basic or Auxiliary plans. If left blank, the workbook queries all Usage data under Analytics tier pricing. Examples: ContainerLogV2, AppTraces, StorageBlobLogs, AWSCloudTrail","isRequired":true,"query":"{"version":"ARMEndpoint/1.0","data":null,"headers":[],"method":"GET","path":"/subscriptions/{Subscription:id}/resourcegroups/{Workspace:resourcegroup}/providers/microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces/{Workspace:name}/tables?api-version=2021-12-01-preview","urlParams":[],"batchDisabled":false,"transformers":[{"type":"jsonpath","settings":{"tablePath":"$.value[?(@.properties.plan==\"Auxiliary\")]","columns":[{"path":"name","columnid":"name","columnType":"string"}]}}]}","isHiddenWhenLocked":true,"queryType":12},{"id":"a0b1c2d3-0001-0001-0001-000000000002","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"AnalyticsCostPerGB","label":"Analytics Tier — Cost per GB (USD)","type":1,"isRequired":true,"value":"4.30","description":"Simplified pricing per-GB rate for Analytics tier ingestion (includes Log Analytics + Sentinel). Default: $4.30 (East US PAYG)."},{"id":"a0b1c2d3-0001-0001-0001-000000000003","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"DataLakeCostPerGB","label":"Data Lake Tier — Cost per GB (USD)","type":1,"isRequired":true,"value":"0.15","description":"Per-GB ingestion rate for Data Lake tier (Basic/Auxiliary). Default: $0.15 (East US)."}],"style":"above","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"---
# Ingestion Cost Summary"},"name":"combined-header"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let dataLakeTablesRaw = "{DataLakeTables}";
let dataLakeList = split(dataLakeTablesRaw, ",");
let dataLakeSet = toscalar(
    print list = dataLakeList
    | mv-expand list
    | extend t = trim(" ", tostring(list))
    | where isnotempty(t)
    | summarize make_set(t)
);
let analyticsCost = todouble("{AnalyticsCostPerGB}");
let dataLakeCost = todouble("{DataLakeCostPerGB}");
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend TotalGB = round(TotalMB / 1024.0, 4)
| extend Tier = iff(set_has_element(dataLakeSet, DataType), "Data Lake", "Analytics")
| extend CostPerGB = iff(Tier == "Data Lake", dataLakeCost, analyticsCost)
| extend EstimatedCost = round(TotalGB * CostPerGB, 2)
| summarize
    AnalyticsGB = round(sumif(TotalGB, Tier == "Analytics"), 2),
    AnalyticsCost = round(sumif(EstimatedCost, Tier == "Analytics"), 2),
    DataLakeGB = round(sumif(TotalGB, Tier == "Data Lake"), 2),
    DataLakeCost = round(sumif(EstimatedCost, Tier == "Data Lake"), 2)
| extend
    TotalGB = round(AnalyticsGB + DataLakeGB, 2),
    TotalCost = round(AnalyticsCost + DataLakeCost, 2)
| project
    ['Analytics (GB)'] = AnalyticsGB,
    ['Analytics Cost ($)'] = AnalyticsCost,
    ['Data Lake (GB)'] = DataLakeGB,
    ['Data Lake Cost ($)'] = DataLakeCost,
    ['Total (GB)'] = TotalGB,
    ['Total Cost ($)'] = TotalCost","size":4,"title":"Analytic Ingestion","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"tiles","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Cost","formatter":0,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}},{"columnMatch":"GB","formatter":0,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}}]},"tileSettings":{"titleContent":{},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Analytics (GB)","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"auto"},"numberFormat":{"unit":39,"options":{"style":"decimal"}}},"rightContent":{"columnMatch":"Analytics Cost ($)","formatter":1,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"currency":"USD","style":"currency"}}},"showBorder":false,"size":"auto"}},"customWidth":"20","name":"Analytic Ingestion"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let dataLakeTablesRaw = "{DataLakeTables}";
let dataLakeList = split(dataLakeTablesRaw, ",");
let dataLakeSet = toscalar(
    print list = dataLakeList
    | mv-expand list
    | extend t = trim(" ", tostring(list))
    | where isnotempty(t)
    | summarize make_set(t)
);
let analyticsCost = todouble("{AnalyticsCostPerGB}");
let dataLakeCost = todouble("{DataLakeCostPerGB}");
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend TotalGB = round(TotalMB / 1024.0, 4)
| extend Tier = iff(set_has_element(dataLakeSet, DataType), "Data Lake", "Analytics")
| extend CostPerGB = iff(Tier == "Data Lake", dataLakeCost, analyticsCost)
| extend EstimatedCost = round(TotalGB * CostPerGB, 2)
| summarize
    AnalyticsGB = round(sumif(TotalGB, Tier == "Analytics"), 2),
    AnalyticsCost = round(sumif(EstimatedCost, Tier == "Analytics"), 2),
    DataLakeGB = round(sumif(TotalGB, Tier == "Data Lake"), 2),
    DataLakeCost = round(sumif(EstimatedCost, Tier == "Data Lake"), 2)
| extend
    TotalGB = round(AnalyticsGB + DataLakeGB, 2),
    TotalCost = round(AnalyticsCost + DataLakeCost, 2)
| project
    ['Analytics (GB)'] = AnalyticsGB,
    ['Analytics Cost ($)'] = AnalyticsCost,
    ['Data Lake (GB)'] = DataLakeGB,
    ['Data Lake Cost ($)'] = DataLakeCost,
    ['Total (GB)'] = TotalGB,
    ['Total Cost ($)'] = TotalCost","size":4,"title":"Data Lake Ingestion","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"tiles","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Cost","formatter":0,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}},{"columnMatch":"GB","formatter":0,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}}]},"tileSettings":{"titleContent":{},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Data Lake (GB)","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"coldHot"},"numberFormat":{"unit":39,"options":{"style":"decimal"}}},"rightContent":{"columnMatch":"Data Lake Cost ($)","formatter":1,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"currency":"USD","style":"currency"}}},"showBorder":false,"size":"auto"}},"customWidth":"20","name":"Data Lake Ingestion"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let dataLakeTablesRaw = "{DataLakeTables}";

Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true

| extend CostPerGB = iff(Tier == "Data Lake", dataLakeCost, analyticsCost)
| extend EstimatedCost = round(TotalGB * CostPerGB, 2)
| summarize
    AnalyticsGB = round(sumif(TotalGB, Tier == "Analytics"), 2),
    AnalyticsCost = round(sumif(EstimatedCost, Tier == "Analytics"), 2),
    DataLakeGB = round(sumif(TotalGB, Tier == "Data Lake"), 2),
    DataLakeCost = round(sumif(EstimatedCost, Tier == "Data Lake"), 2)

    TotalGB = round(AnalyticsGB + DataLakeGB, 2),

| project
    ['Analytics (GB)'] = AnalyticsGB,

    ['Data Lake (GB)'] = DataLakeGB,
    ['Data Lake Cost ($)'] = DataLakeCost,
    ['Total (GB)'] = TotalGB,
    ['Total Cost ($)'] = TotalCost","size":4,"title":"Total Ingestion","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"tiles","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Cost","formatter":0,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}},{"columnMatch":"GB","formatter":0,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}}]},"tileSettings":{"titleContent":{},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Total (GB)","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"},"numberFormat":{"unit":39,"options":{"style":"decimal"}}},"rightContent":{"columnMatch":"Total Cost ($)","formatter":1,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"currency":"USD","style":"currency"}}},"showBorder":false,"size":"auto"}},"customWidth":"20","name":"Total Ingestion"}]},"name":"Ingestion Cost Summary Group"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"---
# Analytics Tier
Tables on the **Analytics** plan — full KQL, alerting, real-time detection. Billed at **${AnalyticsCostPerGB}/GB** (simplified pricing)."},"name":"analytics-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let dataLakeTablesRaw = "{DataLakeTables}";
let dataLakeList = split(dataLakeTablesRaw, ",");
let dataLakeSet = toscalar(
    print list = dataLakeList
    | mv-expand list
    | extend t = trim(" ", tostring(list))
    | where isnotempty(t)
    | summarize make_set(t)
);
let costPerGB = todouble("{AnalyticsCostPerGB}");
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend TotalGB = round(TotalMB / 1024.0, 4)
| where not(set_has_element(dataLakeSet, DataType))
| extend ['Estimated Cost (USD)'] = round(TotalGB * costPerGB, 2)
| project
    ['Table'] = DataType,
    ['Ingestion (GB)'] = round(TotalGB, 2),
    ['Cost per GB (USD)'] = costPerGB,
    ['Estimated Cost (USD)']
| order by ['Estimated Cost (USD)'] desc","size":0,"title":"Analytics Tier — Ingestion & Cost per Table","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Estimated Cost","formatter":3,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"},"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}},{"columnMatch":"Ingestion","formatter":3,"formatOptions":{"palette":"turquoise"},"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}}]},"sortBy":[]},"customWidth":"50","name":"analytics-table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let dataLakeTablesRaw = "{DataLakeTables}";

let dataLakeSet = toscalar(
    print list = dataLakeList
    | mv-expand list
    | extend t = trim(" ", tostring(list))
    | where isnotempty(t)
    | summarize make_set(t)
);
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend TotalGB = round(TotalMB / 1024.0, 2)
| where not(set_has_element(dataLakeSet, DataType))
| top 10 by TotalGB desc
| render piechart with (title = "Analytics Tier — Top 10 Tables by Volume")","size":0,"title":"Analytics Tier — Top 10 Tables by Volume","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"piechart"},"customWidth":"25","name":"analytics-piechart"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let dataLakeTablesRaw = "{DataLakeTables}";
let dataLakeList = split(dataLakeTablesRaw, ",");
let dataLakeSet = toscalar(

    | summarize make_set(t)
);
let costPerGB = todouble("{AnalyticsCostPerGB}");
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend TotalGB = round(TotalMB / 1024.0, 4)
| where not(set_has_element(dataLakeSet, DataType))
| summarize
    ['Total Ingestion (GB)'] = round(sum(TotalGB), 2),
    ['Table Count'] = dcount(DataType)
| extend ['Total Estimated Cost (USD)'] = round(['Total Ingestion (GB)'] * costPerGB, 2)","size":4,"title":"Analytics Tier — Totals","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"titleContent":{},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Total Ingestion (GB)","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"auto"},"numberFormat":{"unit":39,"options":{"style":"decimal"}}},"rightContent":{"columnMatch":"Total Estimated Cost (USD)","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"},"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"currency":"USD","style":"currency"}}},"showBorder":false,"size":"auto"}},"customWidth":"20","name":"analytics-totals"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let dataLakeTablesRaw = "{DataLakeTables}";

let dataLakeSet = toscalar(
    print list = dataLakeList
    | mv-expand list
    | extend t = trim(" ", tostring(list))
    | where isnotempty(t)
    | summarize make_set(t)
);
let costPerGB = todouble("{AnalyticsCostPerGB}");
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| extend TotalGB = TotalMB / 1024.0
| where not(set_has_element(dataLakeSet, DataType))
| summarize DailyGB = round(sum(TotalGB), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| extend ['Daily Cost (USD)'] = round(DailyGB * costPerGB, 2)
| project TimeGenerated, DailyGB, ['Daily Cost (USD)']
| render timechart with (title = "Analytics Tier — Daily Ingestion (GB)")","size":0,"title":"Analytics Tier — Daily Ingestion Trend","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"timechart"},"name":"analytics-trend"}]},"name":"Analytic Group"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"---

# Cost Optimization Insights"},"name":"optimization-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let dataLakeTablesRaw = "{DataLakeTables}";
let dataLakeList = split(dataLakeTablesRaw, ",");
let dataLakeSet = toscalar(
    print list = dataLakeList
    | mv-expand list
    | extend t = trim(" ", tostring(list))
    | where isnotempty(t)
    | summarize make_set(t)
);
let analyticsCost = todouble("{AnalyticsCostPerGB}");
let dataLakeCost = todouble("{DataLakeCostPerGB}");
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend TotalGB = round(TotalMB / 1024.0, 4)
| where not(set_has_element(dataLakeSet, DataType))
| extend
    ['Current Cost (Analytics)'] = round(TotalGB * analyticsCost, 2),
    ['If Moved to Data Lake'] = round(TotalGB * dataLakeCost, 2)
| extend ['Potential Savings (USD)'] = round(['Current Cost (Analytics)'] - ['If Moved to Data Lake'], 2)
| project
    ['Table'] = DataType,
    ['Volume (GB)'] = round(TotalGB, 2),
    ['Current Cost (Analytics)'],
    ['If Moved to Data Lake'],
    ['Potential Savings (USD)']
| order by ['Potential Savings (USD)'] desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"What-If Analysis — Top 15 Analytics Tables: Potential Savings if Moved to Data Lake","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Potential Savings","formatter":3,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenDark"},"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}},{"columnMatch":"Volume","formatter":3,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"},"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}}]},"sortBy":[]},"name":"whatif-savings"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let analyticsCost = todouble("{AnalyticsCostPerGB}");
let dataLakeCost = todouble("{DataLakeCostPerGB}");
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| extend TotalGB = TotalMB / 1024.0
| summarize DailyGB = sum(TotalGB) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| summarize AvgDailyGB = round(avg(DailyGB), 2)
| extend
    ['Avg Daily Ingestion (GB)'] = AvgDailyGB,
    ['Projected Monthly (GB)'] = round(AvgDailyGB * 30, 2),
    ['Monthly at PAYG ($4.30/GB)'] = round(AvgDailyGB * 30 * 4.30, 2),
    ['Monthly at 100GB Tier ($2.96/GB)'] = round(AvgDailyGB * 30 * 2.96, 2),
    ['Monthly at 200GB Tier ($2.76/GB)'] = round(AvgDailyGB * 30 * 2.76, 2),
    ['Monthly at 500GB Tier ($2.48/GB)'] = round(AvgDailyGB * 30 * 2.48, 2)","size":0,"title":"Commitment Tier Comparison — Based on Average Daily Ingestion","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Monthly at","formatter":0,"numberFormat":{"unit":0,"options":{"style":"decimal","minimumFractionDigits":2,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}}]}},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"noshow","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"0"},"name":"commitment-comparison"}],"isLocked":false,"fallbackResourceIds":["Azure Monitor"],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-TCOCostWorkbook"}
